subject: Invoice #8834 Payment Status
body: Hi, I wanted to check on the payment status for invoice #8834 submitted last month. Could you confirm when we can expect the payment to be processed?

subject: Meeting Request for Next Week
body: Hello, I'd like to schedule a meeting to discuss our partnership agreement. Are you available next Tuesday or Wednesday?

subject: Technical Support - Login Issues
body: I'm unable to log into my account. I've tried resetting my password but the reset email never arrives. Can you help with this technical issue?

subject: Product Inquiry - Enterprise Plan
body: We're interested in learning more about your enterprise plan pricing and features. Could you send over the details?

subject: Top 10 Marketing Trends for 2026
body: Check out this week's top marketing trends and strategies for growing your business in 2026.

subject: Overdue Invoice Reminder
body: This is a reminder that invoice #7721 is now 30 days overdue. Please arrange payment at your earliest convenience to avoid late fees.

subject: Support Request - Export Feature Bug
body: I found a bug in the export feature. When I try to export data as CSV, the file is empty. This is a critical issue for our workflow.

subject: Partnership Opportunity Discussion
body: I'd love to schedule a meeting to explore potential collaboration between our companies. Let me know your availability.
